message:
test(core): runtime watch/mpsc helper tests + proptest regression seed [ft-1i2ge.7.6]

Add three new unit tests to runtime.rs covering previously untested
watch and mpsc helper functions:

- watch_helpers_detect_and_consume_updates: verifies that
  watch_has_changed correctly detects value changes on the receiver
  side and that subsequent calls return false until a new send
- watch_has_changed_treats_closed_sender_as_no_change: confirms
  graceful handling when the sender half is dropped (returns false
  instead of panicking)
- mpsc_recv_option_round_trips_and_returns_none_when_closed: validates
  the mpsc_recv_option wrapper round-trips values and returns None
  after sender close

Also updates existing mpsc_bounded_capacity_and_simple_send test to
use mpsc_max_capacity(&tx) instead of a hardcoded constant, making
the assertion resilient to future capacity policy changes.

Adds one new proptest regression seed for rate_limit_tracker that
triggered a failure during concurrent-provider event interleaving
(shrinks to events = [(68, Gemini), (68, Codex)]).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,3 +6,4 @@
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 0d4ea733e6cf4cd4901061d67a8ccd0bdd75fbc27cff932da619ad02c085a7d1 # shrinks to events = [(0, ClaudeCode)]
 cc a739de7ea101ee1dd3a053e7c3ddeebb179d9ba8a11db1e740634534fcaff6ea # shrinks to events = [(438, Gemini), (438, Codex)]
+cc 26e1a3ce09b5aad393696510dd70999c1e1ed4960fbd2d52268b0237f3ad5077 # shrinks to events = [(68, Gemini), (68, Codex)]
